---
name: UX Gap
about: Something works correctly but the experience is missing, confusing, or incomplete
title: "chore: "
labels: ux-gap
---

## Summary

One sentence describing the gap in the experience.

## Current behavior

What happens today. Note that nothing is broken, just describe the flow as it currently works.

## Suggested change

What should be added or changed to close the gap. Keep this small and specific, one improvement, not a list of unrelated ones.

## Why this helps

Short reason this matters (prevents confusion, gives the user control, matches expected behavior elsewhere in the app, etc.).
